subtitle: 10+ years of end-to-end ownership across backend engineering, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, and security. Taking platforms from greenfield to production, handling unpredictable workloads, and operating long-running stateful workflows in fully remote, international teams.

pillars.title: Backend & Platform Engineering
pillars.description: Architecture, API design, type-safe systems, workflow engines. Building maintainable platforms that handle real production traffic.

pillars.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
pillars.description: AWS, Terraform, serverless, Kubernetes. Designing and operating cloud-native systems with strong reliability and cost awareness.

pillars.title: Security & Compliance
pillars.description: ISO-27001, SOC-2, vulnerability management, security hardening. Compliance engineering baked into the architecture, not bolted on.

pillars.title: DevOps & Developer Experience
pillars.description: CI/CD, observability, automation, testing culture. Making teams faster and deploys safer with better tooling and workflows.

now: Currently working on secure SaaS infrastructure, cloud architecture, RCS messaging platforms, and compliance-driven engineering at TexterID — while continuing to operate eSzínház as sole engineer.
